An international standard university in kashmir

JOIN THE MOVEMENT

What is Uni4Kashmir?

Uni4Kashmir is an initiative to bring international standard higher education to the doorsteps of the people of Jammu & Kashmir. Uni4Kashmir is more than just a university—it is a movement.

Born from the aspirations of the people, Uni4Kashmir is a crowdfunded, community-driven university dedicated to bringing world-class education, innovation, and skill development to Jammu & Kashmir. This is Kashmir’s first university built for the people, by the people, and of the people.

At its core, Uni4Kashmir is a response to the pressing need for cutting-edge education in fields like Artificial Intelligence, Robotics, Quantum Computing, Cybersecurity, Biotechnology, and Big Data while also fostering excellence in Social Sciences, Humanities, Environmental Studies, Law, Business, and the Arts.

We believe that true progress comes from a holistic and multidisciplinary approach—where technology meets ethics, science meets society, and innovation is driven by human values. Uni4Kashmir will be a place where future engineers, doctors, entrepreneurs, artists, writers, and thought leaders will come together to build a better tomorrow.

This initiative is not owned by any individual or corporation. It is owned by the people of J&K, funded through public contributions, and driven by a vision of hope, progress, and self-reliance.

Join the movement. Build the future. Uni4Kashmir is ours.

Dr.Mehboob Makhdoomi, Founder.

MBA from IUP, Pennsylvania- United States, a research degree from Cardiff- United Kingdom, International Marketing & International Business & Economy from Harvard University.
